title: Department of Defense support for "Mission: Impossible -- Dead Reckoning Part One"

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any documents pertaining to collaboration between the Department of Defense (DoD) and the production of the 2023 movie "Mission: Impossible -- Dead Reckoning Part One" (also known as "Mission: Impossible 7"), directed by Christopher McQuarrie and starring Tom Cruise. I request any and all documents pertaining to DoD support for "Mission: Impossible -- Dead Reckoning Part One." Such documents may include but should not be not limited to: script notes; production assistance agreements; and all records of communications between employees of the DoD and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "Mission: Impossible -- Dead Reckoning Part One," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication.

I am the Director of Research Operations at a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization called The Decoding Culture Foundation. These documents will be used for public education and research purposes. I therefore request a waiver of all fees that may otherwise apply.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Zackary DeCicco

title: CRIME DATA WITHIN LAST 12 MONTHS OF WASHOE COUNTY SHERRIFF'S OFFICE

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I would like to request number data of Washoe County Sherriff's Office crime rate from January 1, 2025 to February 23, 2026 to determine if the annual crime data trend is rising or decreasing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

ROBERT RINCON

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1) All calls for service to Disneyland Resort, California Adventure Park, and/or Downtown Disney District between the dates of January 2025 through when this request is processed. 

2) All, if any, arrest records involving individuals that were in either Disneyland Resort, California Adventure Park, or Downtown Disney District at time of arrest between the dates of January 2025 to when this request is processed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Zackary DeCicco

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All complaints made against University of Nevada, Reno Greek Life—whether recognized fraternities and sororities, previously recognized fraternities and sororities, and those working towards University recognition — either through the UNR Greek Life website, through the UNR police department, or any other manner from August 20, 2024, through February 23, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Madison Burrows
